content: agent2 here: implementing 'backup' feature (Add automatic backup functionality when overwriting existing files) - adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method only, minimal diff. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

ack — my backup/backup_suffix changes are in save() around the 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' line and the docstring params section. My env seems isolated (my git diff only shows my edits), so probably no literal clobbering, but flagging in case params ordering matters for you.
